title: Phymatopteris majoensis
taxonomy: Phymatopteris majoensis belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This species is classified as a type of fern, specifically within the genus Phymatopteris. It is a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes various species of ferns. Phymatopteris majoensis further belongs to the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse group of ferns. The classification of Phymatopteris majoensis continues with its family-level classification within the subfamily Polypodiinae.
